compliance.note: OPERATOR OVERRIDE — real court-ordered listing data published on the public LP during the bridge period, before GVR WebAPI authorization. Standard rule is research-tier only (see scripts/scrape-foreclosure-deals.mjs header). Override accepted by Amir Omidvar; flagged for managing-broker awareness (Shirin Saleh, licence #X031527) — CREA Code-of-Ethics exposure on her licence. To stay as defensible as possible: street numbers fully removed (street name + neighbourhood only); MLS numbers removed from the published cards (retained only in the research dump foreclosure-deals.scraped.json); card photos are generic representative-by-type images, NOT actual MLS listing photos (republishing licensed listing photos would be copyright infringement); no listing remarks, no agent names. Replace this file with the GVR-feed-backed source once the WebAPI is authorized — IDX feeds license real per-listing photos.
